landing.hero_sub: Find a home printer in your building. Upload your document. Get it delivered to your door.
landing.step1_desc: Enter your pincode to find a printer in your building.
landing.step2_desc: Share your PDF, JPG, or image. We detect the page count automatically.
landing.step3_desc: Your neighbour prints it and drops it to your door.
landing.owners_desc: Turn your home printer into a neighbourhood service. Cover your ink costs and earn from every page.

find.title: Printers near {{pincode}}
find.empty_title: No printer found in your area yet.
find.empty_desc: Know someone with a printer? Tell them about InkNeighbour!
find.filter_empty_desc: Try the "All" filter to see every printer nearby.

register.title: Set up your shop
register.provider_home_desc: I print for my neighbours in the same building
register.provider_home_b3: Cover your ink costs and earn
register.provider_shop_desc: I run a professional print business
register.provider_validation: Please select a provider type to continue
register.validation_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.landmark_placeholder: e.g. Near Metro Station, Opposite Big Bazaar
register.map_pin_label: Pin your shop on the map
register.map_pin_hint: Customers use this to get directions to your shop.
register.map_pin_privacy: Pin your shop entrance or storefront — customers will use this for directions.
register.shop_map_required: Please set a map pin for your shop location
register.society_taken: This society already has a printer. The owner is {{name}}.
register.confirm_different: Click confirm again if your society is different.
register.override_confirmed: Confirmed — adding as a new society.

success.title: Your shop is live!
success.desc: Customers in {{society}} can now send you print jobs.
success.pending_desc: Your shop is under review by our admin team. You will be notified once it is approved and ready to take orders.
success.share_prompt: Share your shop link with your neighbours:

login.title: Owner login
login.error_invalid: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Shop
dashboard.empty_pending: No pending jobs. Share your shop link to get started.
dashboard.empty_printing: No jobs being printed right now.
dashboard.pending_approval_desc: Your shop registration is under review. Our admin team will approve it shortly. Check back here — once approved, you will be able to go live and accept print jobs.

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.profitable_msg: Your printer paid for itself this month.
earnings.breakeven_msg: Almost there — just a few more jobs to cover your ink.
earnings.loss_msg: Print more to cover your costs — share your link with neighbours!

settings.title: Settings
settings.deactivate_confirm: Are you sure? This will make your shop unavailable to customers.
settings.map_pin_hint: Drag the pin or search to update your shop location for customers.
settings.service_menu_hint: Toggle services you offer. Add a price or description for each.
settings.operating_hours_hint: Set the days and times you accept orders.

feedback_dashboard.title: Feedback
feedback_dashboard.empty: No feedback yet. Once customers rate their orders, you'll see it here.

shop.delivery_fee_estimated: Actual delivery fee confirmed by the shop based on your distance.

order_confirm.title: Order placed!
order_confirm.subtitle: Your print job is on its way.

feedback_form.title: How was your print?
feedback_form.subtitle: Job {{jobNumber}} · {{society}}
feedback_form.success_desc: Your feedback helps keep the service great 🙏
feedback_form.expired_desc: Feedback links are valid for 7 days after delivery. Thank you for your feedback!
feedback_form.already_submitted: Feedback has already been submitted for this order.
feedback_form.star_required: Please select a star rating to continue.

upload.drag_or_tap: Tap to upload or drag & drop
upload.page_count_unknown_hint: We couldn't detect the page count. The owner will confirm before printing.

errors.file_too_large: Your file is too large. Please compress it and try again.
errors.file_invalid_type: Only PDF, JPG, and PNG files are accepted.
errors.download_failed: Could not download the file. Please try again.
errors.network: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.shop_paused: This shop is temporarily closed. Try again later.
errors.shop_pending: This shop is awaiting admin approval and is not yet open for orders.

services.scan_desc: Scan documents to PDF or image
services.binding_desc: Spiral or comb binding for reports
services.passport_photo_desc: Standard size for visas and IDs

pwa.ios_install_hint: Tap the Share button below, then "Add to Home Screen" for the best experience.

reliability.warning: Your score is below 70%. If it stays low, your shop will be automatically paused for 24 hours.

soft_lock.message: Your shop is paused due to low reliability. It will unlock at {{time}}.

commitment.title: Ready to go live?
commitment.message: When your shop is live, customers can send you print jobs. You are expected to accept or reject each job within 15 minutes.
commitment.point1: Respond to every job within 15 minutes.
commitment.point2: Missed jobs hurt your reliability score.
commitment.point3: Three missed jobs in a row may pause your shop.

transparency.try_again_avg: Average job takes {{minutes}} min. Try again soon!
transparency.try_again_later: Please try again in a little while.

job_limit.reached: This printer has reached its job limit. Please try again once a current job is complete.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Control when customers can place orders
availability.override_message: Your shop was automatically paused due to missed orders. It will reopen at {{time}}.
availability.override_active: Your shop is paused until {{time}} due to missed orders.
availability.override_active_short: Cannot go live — shop is under automatic pause.
availability.rapid_toggle: Please wait {{seconds}} more seconds before toggling again.
availability.explain_override: System override: paused automatically due to missed jobs (highest priority)
availability.explain_manual_on: Manual ON: you are live and accepting orders
availability.explain_manual_off: Manual OFF: you have paused your shop
availability.explain_schedule: Schedule: availability follows your time slots below
availability.slot_time_invalid: End time must be after start time.
availability.no_schedule_desc: Add time slots to let the schedule control your availability automatically.
